name: output-evolution-extension
description: Transform boring ChatGPT and Gemini outputs into beautifully styled, premium-looking content.

scripts.build: npm run build:popup && npm run build:scripts && node scripts/copy-assets.js && node scripts/zip-build.js
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); if (fs.existsSync('OutputEvolution.zip')) fs.unlinkSync('OutputEvolution.zip');"
